chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Suit No.721 of 2010 Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For maintainability of CMA No.12935/2019. 2. For orders on Commissioner report dated 27.1.2020. ------------------ 08.02.2021 Mr. Muniruddin, Advocate for plaintiff. ------------------ 1. Learned counsel for the plaintiff contends that the evidence of the proposed witness is necessary; therefore, this application has been moved. Under Order XVI, rule 14, C.P.C. the Court on its own can summon any person stranger to the suit to appear and to give evidence or to produce any document in his possession, who has not been called by the parties to suit as witness. It is sole discretion of the Court to call such person; however, the parties are not entitled to make any such application for calling any person as Court witness. Hence, this application being not maintainable in law is dismissed accordingly. 2. Adjourned to a date in office. JUDGE Athar Zai
